sentences.hanzi: 这座城市的地铁很方便。
sentences.pinyin: zhè zuò chéngshì de dìtiě hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.english: This city's subway is very convenient.

sentences.hanzi: 那栋大楼是什么时候建的？
sentences.pinyin: nà dòng dàlóu shì shénme shíhou jiàn de?
sentences.english: When was that building built?

sentences.hanzi: 公园里种了很多树。
sentences.pinyin: gōngyuán lǐ zhòng le hěn duō shù.
sentences.english: Many trees were planted in the park.

sentences.hanzi: 这条街上有很多小店。
sentences.pinyin: zhè tiáo jiē shàng yǒu hěn duō xiǎo diàn.
sentences.english: There are many small shops on this street.

sentences.hanzi: 这两年新修了好几条地铁线，出行方便多了。
sentences.pinyin: zhè liǎng nián xīn xiū le hǎo jǐ tiáo dìtiě xiàn, chūxíng fāngbiàn duō le.
sentences.english: Several new subway lines opened in the past couple years — getting around is much easier now.

sentences.hanzi: 老房子看着有味道，新楼千篇一律。
sentences.pinyin: lǎo fángzi kàn zhe yǒu wèidào, xīn lóu qiānpiān yīlǜ.
sentences.english: Old buildings have character — new ones all look the same.

sentences.hanzi: 我喜欢在河边散步。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan zài hé biān sànbù.
sentences.english: I like walking by the river.

sentences.hanzi: 这个区域正在改造。
sentences.pinyin: zhège qūyù zhèngzài gǎizào.
sentences.english: This area is being renovated.

sentences.hanzi: 桥那边是老城区。
sentences.pinyin: qiáo nàbiān shì lǎo chéngqū.
sentences.english: The old town is on the other side of the bridge.

sentences.hanzi: 晚上城市的灯光很漂亮。
sentences.pinyin: wǎnshàng chéngshì de dēngguāng hěn piàoliang.
sentences.english: The city lights at night are very beautiful.

sentences.hanzi: 他每天坐公交车上班。
sentences.pinyin: tā měitiān zuò gōngjiāochē shàngbān.
sentences.english: He takes the bus to work every day.

sentences.hanzi: 新的地铁站下个月开。
sentences.pinyin: xīn de dìtiě zhàn xià gè yuè kāi.
sentences.english: The new subway station opens next month.

sentences.hanzi: 步行街上人很多。
sentences.pinyin: bùxíngjiē shàng rén hěn duō.
sentences.english: The pedestrian street is very crowded.

sentences.hanzi: 这个城市有两千多年的历史。
sentences.pinyin: zhège chéngshì yǒu liǎng qiān duō nián de lìshǐ.
sentences.english: This city has over two thousand years of history.

sentences.hanzi: 我住在市中心附近。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ zhù zài shì zhōngxīn fùjìn.
sentences.english: I live near the city center.

sentences.hanzi: 这条路很长。
sentences.pinyin: zhè tiáo lù hěn cháng.
sentences.english: This road is very long.

sentences.hanzi: 我家在学校后面。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ jiā zài xuéxiào hòumiàn.
sentences.english: My home is behind the school.

sentences.hanzi: 城市规划需要考虑居民的实际需求。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì guīhuà xūyào kǎolǜ jūmín de shíjì xūqiú.
sentences.english: Urban planning needs to consider the actual needs of residents.

sentences.hanzi: 这个商业区的停车位严重不足。
sentences.pinyin: zhège shāngyè qū de tíngchē wèi yánzhòng bùzú.
sentences.english: This commercial district has a serious shortage of parking spaces.

sentences.hanzi: 老旧小区的电梯加装工程已经启动。
sentences.pinyin: lǎojiù xiǎoqū de diàntī jiāzhuāng gōngchéng yǐjīng qǐdòng.
sentences.english: The elevator installation project for older residential complexes has already been launched.

sentences.hanzi: 市政府决定在郊区建设一个新的科技园区。
sentences.pinyin: shì zhèngfǔ juédìng zài jiāoqū jiànshè yīgè xīn de kējì yuánqū.
sentences.english: The city government decided to build a new technology park in the suburbs.

sentences.hanzi: 这片历史街区的建筑风格反映了不同时期的特点。
sentences.pinyin: zhè piàn lìshǐ jiēqū de jiànzhù fēnggé fǎnyìng le bùtóng shíqī de tèdiǎn.
sentences.english: The architectural styles of this historic district reflect the characteristics of different periods.

sentences.hanzi: 自行车道的增加减少了交通拥堵和空气污染。
sentences.pinyin: zìxíngchē dào de zēngjiā jiǎnshǎo le jiāotōng yōngdǔ hé kōngqì wūrǎn.
sentences.english: The addition of bicycle lanes has reduced traffic congestion and air pollution.

sentences.hanzi: 城市绿化面积的增加有效改善了居民的生活质量。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì lǜhuà miànjī de zēngjiā yǒuxiào gǎishàn le jūmín de shēnghuó zhìliàng.
sentences.english: The increase in urban green space has effectively improved residents' quality of life.

sentences.hanzi: 地下管网的老化给城市防洪带来了很大的隐患。
sentences.pinyin: dìxià guǎnwǎng de lǎohuà gěi chéngshì fánghóng dàilái le hěn dà de yǐnhuàn.
sentences.english: The aging of the underground pipe network has brought significant hidden dangers to urban flood prevention.

sentences.hanzi: 旧城改造项目必须在保留历史风貌和满足现代功能之间取得平衡。
sentences.pinyin: jiùchéng gǎizào xiàngmù bìxū zài bǎoliú lìshǐ fēngmào hé mǎnzú xiàndài gōngnéng zhījiān qǔdé pínghéng.
sentences.english: Old city renovation projects must strike a balance between preserving historical character and meeting modern functional needs.

sentences.hanzi: 城市热岛效应的加剧与不合理的建筑布局密切相关。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì rèdǎo xiàoyìng de jiājù yǔ bù hélǐ de jiànzhù bùjú mìqiè xiāngguān.
sentences.english: The intensification of the urban heat island effect is closely related to unreasonable building layouts.

sentences.hanzi: 轨道交通沿线的土地开发带动了周边商业的繁荣。
sentences.pinyin: guǐdào jiāotōng yánxiàn de tǔdì kāifā dàidòng le zhōubiān shāngyè de fánróng.
sentences.english: Land development along rail transit lines has driven the prosperity of surrounding commercial areas.

sentences.hanzi: 海绵城市的建设理念强调通过自然手段管理城市雨水。
sentences.pinyin: hǎimián chéngshì de jiànshè lǐniàn qiángdiào tōngguò zìrán shǒuduàn guǎnlǐ chéngshì yǔshuǐ.
sentences.english: The sponge city construction concept emphasizes managing urban stormwater through natural means.

sentences.hanzi: 以公共交通为导向的开发模式有助于缓解城市蔓延带来的生态压力。
sentences.pinyin: yǐ gōnggòng jiāotōng wéi dǎoxiàng de kāifā móshì yǒuzhù yú huǎnjiě chéngshì mányán dàilái de shēngtài yālì.
sentences.english: Transit-oriented development models help alleviate the ecological pressures caused by urban sprawl.

sentences.hanzi: 城市更新不应简单地等同于拆旧建新，而应注重社区肌理的有机延续。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì gēngxīn bù yīng jiǎndān de děngtóng yú chāi jiù jiàn xīn, ér yīng zhùzhòng shèqū jīlǐ de yǒujī yánxù.
sentences.english: Urban renewal should not simply be equated with demolishing the old and building the new, but should focus on the organic continuation of community fabric.

sentences.hanzi: 智慧城市的概念正在从技术驱动转向以人为本的综合治理。
sentences.pinyin: zhìhuì chéngshì de gàiniàn zhèngzài cóng jìshù qūdòng zhuǎnxiàng yǐ rén wéi běn de zōnghé zhìlǐ.
sentences.english: The concept of smart cities is shifting from technology-driven to people-oriented comprehensive governance.

sentences.hanzi: 城市天际线的管控体现了规划部门对视觉秩序和空间美感的追求。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì tiānjìxiàn de guǎnkòng tǐxiàn le guīhuà bùmén duì shìjué zhìxù hé kōngjiān měigǎn de zhuīqiú.
sentences.english: The regulation of the city skyline reflects the planning department's pursuit of visual order and spatial aesthetics.

sentences.hanzi: 15分钟生活圈的规划理念旨在让居民步行即可满足日常基本需求。
sentences.pinyin: shíwǔ fēnzhōng shēnghuó quān de guīhuà lǐniàn zhǐzài ràng jūmín bùxíng jí kě mǎnzú rìcháng jīběn xūqiú.
sentences.english: The 15-minute living circle planning concept aims to let residents meet basic daily needs within walking distance.

sentences.hanzi: 工业遗产的活化利用为城市文化空间注入了新的创意活力。
sentences.pinyin: gōngyè yíchǎn de huóhuà lìyòng wèi chéngshì wénhuà kōngjiān zhùrù le xīn de chuàngyì huólì.
sentences.english: The adaptive reuse of industrial heritage has injected new creative vitality into urban cultural spaces.

sentences.hanzi: 城中村的治理困境折射出快速城镇化进程中土地制度与社会管理的深层矛盾。
sentences.pinyin: chéngzhōngcūn de zhìlǐ kùnjìng zhéshè chū kuàisù chéngzhènhuà jìnchéng zhōng tǔdì zhìdù yǔ shèhuì guǎnlǐ de shēncéng máodùn.
sentences.english: The governance dilemma of urban villages reflects the deep contradictions between land systems and social management in the process of rapid urbanization.

sentences.hanzi: 韧性城市建设的关键在于构建多层次、跨部门的灾害应急响应体系。
sentences.pinyin: rènxìng chéngshì jiànshè de guānjiàn zàiyú gòujiàn duō céngcì, kuà bùmén de zāihài yìngjí xiǎngyìng tǐxì.
sentences.english: The key to resilient city construction lies in building a multi-layered, cross-departmental disaster emergency response system.

sentences.hanzi: 混合用途开发策略通过功能叠加来激活街区的全时段活力。
sentences.pinyin: hùnhé yòngtú kāifā cèlüè tōngguò gōngnéng diéjiā lái jīhuó jiēqū de quán shíduàn huólì.
sentences.english: Mixed-use development strategies activate neighborhoods' around-the-clock vitality through functional layering.

sentences.hanzi: 城市收缩现象要求规划者从增量扩张思维转向存量优化的精细化管理。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì shōusuō xiànxiàng yāoqiú guīhuàzhě cóng zēngliàng kuòzhāng sīwéi zhuǎnxiàng cúnliàng yōuhuà de jīngxìhuà guǎnlǐ.
sentences.english: Urban shrinkage requires planners to shift from incremental expansion thinking to refined management of existing stock.

sentences.hanzi: 绿色建筑标准的强制推行正在重塑房地产行业的技术门槛和成本结构。
sentences.pinyin: lǜsè jiànzhù biāozhǔn de qiángzhì tuīxíng zhèngzài chóngsù fángdìchǎn hángyè de jìshù ménkǎn hé chéngběn jiégòu.
sentences.english: The mandatory implementation of green building standards is reshaping the technology thresholds and cost structures of the real estate industry.

sentences.hanzi: 城市非正规经济空间的治理需要在秩序规范与民生保障之间寻求务实的妥协。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì fēi zhèngguī jīngjì kōngjiān de zhìlǐ xūyào zài zhìxù guīfàn yǔ mínshēng bǎozhàng zhījiān xúnqiú wùshí de tuǒxié.
sentences.english: The governance of urban informal economic spaces requires seeking pragmatic compromise between orderly regulation and livelihood protection.

sentences.hanzi: 城市空间的金融化趋势正在深刻重塑住房的社会属性与空间正义格局。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì kōngjiān de jīnrónghuà qūshì zhèngzài shēnkè chóngsù zhùfáng de shèhuì shǔxìng yǔ kōngjiān zhèngyì géjú.
sentences.english: The financialization trend of urban space is profoundly reshaping the social attributes of housing and the landscape of spatial justice.

sentences.hanzi: 新城市主义倡导的步行友好型街区设计挑战了汽车中心主义的规划范式。
sentences.pinyin: xīn chéngshì zhǔyì chàngdǎo de bùxíng yǒuhǎo xíng jiēqū shèjì tiǎozhàn le qìchē zhōngxīn zhǔyì de guīhuà fànshì.
sentences.english: The walkable neighborhood design advocated by New Urbanism challenges the automobile-centric planning paradigm.

sentences.hanzi: 大规模基础设施投资的乘数效应必须在长期债务风险的约束下审慎评估。
sentences.pinyin: dà guīmó jīchǔ shèshī tóuzī de chéngshù xiàoyìng bìxū zài chángqī zhàiwù fēngxiǎn de yuēshù xià shěnshèn pínggū.
sentences.english: The multiplier effect of large-scale infrastructure investment must be prudently evaluated under the constraints of long-term debt risk.

sentences.hanzi: 自动驾驶技术的普及将从根本上改变城市停车空间配置和道路宽度标准。
sentences.pinyin: zìdòng jiàshǐ jìshù de pǔjí jiāng cóng gēnběn shàng gǎibiàn chéngshì tíngchē kōngjiān pèizhì hé dàolù kuāndù biāozhǔn.
sentences.english: The widespread adoption of autonomous driving technology will fundamentally change urban parking space allocation and road width standards.

sentences.hanzi: 城市夜间经济的培育需要在商业活力激发与居民生活品质保障之间寻求制度性平衡。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì yèjiān jīngjì de péiyù xūyào zài shāngyè huólì jīfā yǔ jūmín shēnghuó pǐnzhì bǎozhàng zhījiān xúnqiú zhìdùxìng pínghéng.
sentences.english: Cultivating urban nighttime economy requires seeking institutional balance between stimulating commercial vitality and safeguarding residents' quality of life.

sentences.hanzi: 参与式规划方法论的兴起反映了城市治理从精英主导向公众协商的范式转型。
sentences.pinyin: cānyùshì guīhuà fāngfǎlùn de xīngqǐ fǎnyìng le chéngshì zhìlǐ cóng jīngyīng zhǔdǎo xiàng gōngzhòng xiéshāng de fànshì zhuǎnxíng.
sentences.english: The rise of participatory planning methodology reflects a paradigm shift in urban governance from elite-led to public deliberation.

sentences.hanzi: 城市作为资本积累的空间载体，其形态演变始终受制于土地租差理论所揭示的价值分配逻辑。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì zuòwéi zīběn jīlěi de kōngjiān zàitǐ, qí xíngtài yǎnbiàn shǐzhōng shòuzhì yú tǔdì zūchā lǐlùn suǒ jiēshì de jiàzhí fēnpèi luójí.
sentences.english: The city, as a spatial vehicle of capital accumulation, has its morphological evolution perpetually constrained by the value distribution logic revealed by the theory of land rent gaps.

sentences.hanzi: 去增长理论对主流城市发展叙事的根本性质疑，为收缩型城市的规划转型提供了另一种认识论框架。
sentences.pinyin: qù zēngzhǎng lǐlùn duì zhǔliú chéngshì fāzhǎn xùshì de gēnběnxìng zhìyí, wèi shōusuō xíng chéngshì de guīhuà zhuǎnxíng tígōng le lìng yī zhǒng rènshilùn kuàngjià.
sentences.english: Degrowth theory's fundamental questioning of the mainstream urban development narrative provides an alternative epistemological framework for the planning transformation of shrinking cities.

sentences.hanzi: 空间生产的政治经济学批判揭示了城市更新表象下资本逐利与居民权益之间不可调和的结构性张力。
sentences.pinyin: kōngjiān shēngchǎn de zhèngzhì jīngjìxué pīpàn jiēshì le chéngshì gēngxīn biǎoxiàng xià zīběn zhúlì yǔ jūmín quányì zhījiān bùkě tiáohé de jiégòuxìng zhānglì.
sentences.english: The political economy critique of spatial production reveals the irreconcilable structural tension between capital profit-seeking and residents' rights beneath the surface of urban renewal.

sentences.hanzi: 城市权利理论主张空间的使用价值应当优先于交换价值，从而赋予居民重塑城市形态的集体能动性。
sentences.pinyin: chéngshì quánlì lǐlùn zhǔzhāng kōngjiān de shǐyòng jiàzhí yīngdāng yōuxiān yú jiāohuàn jiàzhí, cóngér fùyǔ jūmín chóngsù chéngshì xíngtài de jítǐ néngdòngxìng.
sentences.english: The right to the city theory asserts that the use value of space should take priority over exchange value, thereby granting residents collective agency to reshape urban form.

sentences.hanzi: 超大城市治理的根本张力在于规模经济效益的持续追求与系统性脆弱性累积之间的不可兼得。
sentences.pinyin: chāodà chéngshì zhìlǐ de gēnběn zhānglì zàiyú guīmó jīngjì xiàoyì de chíxù zhuīqiú yǔ xìtǒngxìng cuìruòxìng lěijī zhījiān de bùkě jiāndé.
sentences.english: The fundamental tension in megacity governance lies in the incompatibility between the continuous pursuit of economies of scale and the accumulation of systemic vulnerability.

sentences.hanzi: 建成环境的物质性铭刻了权力关系的空间化表达，使得城市形态本身成为一种意识形态文本。
sentences.pinyin: jiànchéng huánjìng de wùzhìxìng míngjī le quánlì guānxì de kōngjiānhuà biǎodá, shǐde chéngshì xíngtài běnshēn chéngwéi yī zhǒng yìshí xíngtài wénběn.
sentences.english: The materiality of the built environment inscribes the spatial expression of power relations, making urban form itself an ideological text.
